member.summary: Builds a default BritaLogger object.

member.summary: Implementation of the BritaHandler interface.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Constuctor for using trace id mock for unit tests.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandler.StoreBritaChecksumAndVersion(System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stores Brita instances names.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandlerLegacy
member.summary: Implementation of the BritaHandler interface.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandlerLegacy.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandlerLegacy.GetBritaChecksumInstanceNames(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets list of checksum instances.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandlerLegacy.PopulateTestFlowItems(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Tuple{System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Populates all flow items names and types.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandlerLegacy.ResolveFlowItemsPaths(System.Func{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}})
member.summary: Converts TOS path to TRACE path. When this function called for checksum calculations, TraceId nuget version 6 required to see all flow items, including flow type items, in this case also "MAIN" flow need to be added manually. (note this only needed in legacy mode for TOS3.10.20 and below).

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandlerLegacy.GetInstanceNamesAndPorts(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Converts TOS path to TRACE path.
member.returns: list of converted checksum instances and their exit ports.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.summary: Scoreboard Logger interface.

member.summary: Gets checksum string encoded by Trace API.
member.returns: list of checksum instances and version.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.IBritaHandler.GetTraceId(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets trace id string representing executed instances and ports encoded for Trace.
member.returns: Brita trace id for currently executed unit/flow.
